AWARDS.Category Winners ($50 each): The highest average score for each judging category
AWARDS.Best Overall ($75): The highest average score from all categories weighted equally.

JUDGING.Theme: How well the game interprets and incorporates the theme through gameplay, story, mechanics, visuals, or other creative approaches.
JUDGING.Fun: How enjoyable the game is to play. This includes the core gameplay loop, pacing, and overall entertainment value.
JUDGING.Innovation: A broad category that evaluates the game's creativity and originality, as well as the execution of those ideas.
JUDGING.Art: Overall visual representation of the game. This includes models, sprites, animations, UI, lighting, effects, and artistic cohesion/direction.
JUDGING.Sound: How well the audio enhances the game’s experience. This includes sound effects, music, and voice work.
